summary: Remove non-actionable in-progress approval visibility and move approval records into project-block detail cards.

notes: Drops public.approval_visible_timesheets_view because the approval center no longer shows non-actionable in-progress timesheets.
Keeps approval_audit_scopes and reviewed-timesheet audit visibility unchanged.
Removes the 流转中（未轮到我） group from desktop and mobile approval centers.
Approval task counts now include only actionable timesheet project blocks and OT items.
Approval chain cards show process stages and project-block statuses without making approvers the main node content.
Expanded timesheet detail now shows full approval records grouped by project block, with action, status, actor, source, time, and comments.

verification: Run npx vite build from frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.37.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.37.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.37.
known_warnings: Vite still reports large production chunks for existing application bundles.
